description_long: This is a grand piano with a sleek black exterior and a partially open lid, revealing a golden-brown interior soundboard. The piano features a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and a matching black bench positioned in front. The body is robust and curves elegantly, typical of concert grand pianos, with three sturdy legs supporting its weight. The lid is propped open with a support stick, allowing a view into the instrument's interior. The pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, and the overall finish is glossy, reflecting light subtly. No visible brand or logo markings are present on the exterior.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a partially open lid, golden-brown interior, and matching bench. It features a full keyboard and visible pedals beneath.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three pedals, and the matching bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's curved body, partially open lid, and the depth of the instrument.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the broad, curved back and the open lid revealing the golden-brown interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the piano and the closed side of the lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
